ValidationRule.description: The case cannot be closed (L1 Closed) if the Investigation Result (L1) is not populated.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , 'L1 Closed') && ISBLANK(Investigation_Result_L1__c), TRUE, FALSE )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The case cannot be closed (L1 Closed) if the Investigation Result (L1) is not populated.
